scripts.psd:gen-all: node tools/psd/GenPsd.js psd/configs/UI_MainMenu.json psd/configs/UI_MainHome.json psd/configs/UI_ResultVictory.json psd/configs/UI_ResultDefeat.json psd/configs/BattleHUD_demo.json
scripts.psd:main-to-assets: node tools/psd/PsdToPrefab.js psd/UI_MainMenu.psd --out assets/net_main/prefab --img assets/net_main/textures/ui/main --ts assets/scripts/game/ui/panel/generated --preview assets/net_main/textures/preview --prefab-name MainMenu --script assets/scripts/game/ui/panel/MainMenuPanel.ts
scripts.psd:home-to-assets: node tools/psd/PsdToPrefab.js psd/UI_MainHome.psd --out assets/net_main/prefab --img assets/net_main/textures/ui/home --ts assets/scripts/game/ui/panel/generated --preview assets/net_main/textures/preview --prefab-name MainHome
scripts.psd:victory-to-assets: node tools/psd/PsdToPrefab.js psd/UI_ResultVictory.psd --out assets/net_battle/prefab/ui --img assets/net_battle/textures/ui/result_victory --ts assets/scripts/game/ui/panel/generated --preview assets/net_battle/textures/preview --prefab-name ResultVictory --script assets/scripts/game/ui/panel/ResultVictoryPanel.ts
scripts.psd:defeat-to-assets: node tools/psd/PsdToPrefab.js psd/UI_ResultDefeat.psd --out assets/net_battle/prefab/ui --img assets/net_battle/textures/ui/result_defeat --ts assets/scripts/game/ui/panel/generated --preview assets/net_battle/textures/preview --prefab-name ResultDefeat --script assets/scripts/game/ui/panel/ResultDefeatPanel.ts
